title: Resample
description: Technique of transforming a digital image to alter resolution, orientation, or sampling points for applications in medical, industrial, and remote sensing contexts.

definitions.definition: Technique of transforming a digital image to alter resolution, orientation, or sampling points for applications in medical, industrial, and remote sensing contexts.
definitions.sources:
- Gurjar, S.B., Padmanabhan, N. Study of various resampling techniques for high-resolution remote sensing imagery. J Indian Soc Remote Sens 33, 113–120 (2005). [https://doi.org/10.1007/BF02989999](https://doi.org/10.1007/BF02989999)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
